name: AttributeTypeNameEditor
summary: The AttributeTypeNameEditor class provides a user interface for selecting a type for the bound attribute.

constructors.name: AttributeTypeNameEditor
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AttributeTypeNameEditor class

methods.name: EditValue
methods.signature: public override Object EditValue(ITypeDescriptorContext context, IServiceProvider provider, Object value)
methods.summary: Edits the specified object's value using the editor style indicated by the GetEditStyle method.

params.name: context
params.doc: An ITypeDescriptorContext that can be used to gain additional context information.

params.name: provider
params.doc: An IServiceProvider that the editor can use to obtain services.

returns.doc: The new value of the object. If the value of the object has not changed, this should return the same object it was passed.

methods.name: GetEditStyle
methods.summary: Gets the editor style used by the EditValue method.

params.name: context
params.doc: An ITypeDescriptorContext that can be used to gain additional context information.

returns.doc: A UITypeEditorEditStyle value that indicates the style of the editor used by the EditValue method. If the UITypeEditor does not support the method, then GetEditStyle will return None.
